data.title: Radio Flyer City 4-in-1 Stroll 'N Trike, Teal, for Riders 1-5 Years Old, 4 Riding Modes, 3 Point Harness with Comfort Pad, Pa
data.summary: SAFETY AND COMFORT: A 3-point harness with padded shoulders, comfort seat pad, UV protection canopy, removable snack tray, and removable footrest keep little riders safe, comfortable, and cool on every ride. | PARENT-CONTROLLED STEERING: The adjustable Steer & Stroll push handle
